mapper.select: select * from community_user where name like concat('%',#{name},'%') and phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%') and id_card like concat('%',#{idCard},'%') and gender like concat('%',#{gender},'%') and specific_address like concat('%',#{specificAddress},'%') order by create_time desc
select count(*) from community_user where live_data >= '2021-01-01' and live_data < '2022-01-01'
select count(*) from community_user where live_data >= '2022-01-01' and live_data < '2023-01-01'
select count(*) from community_user where live_data >= '2023-01-01' and live_data < '2024-01-01'
select count(*) from community_user where live_data >= '2024-01-01' and live_data < '2025-01-01'
select count(*) from community_user where live_data >= '2025-01-01' and live_data < '2026-01-01'
mapper.update: update community_user set name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, specific_address = #{specificAddress}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
